full_en: Hey there, welcome to Situation English — the tool that helps you turn everyday Chinese into natural, conversational English you can actually use in real life.

chunks.en: Hey there, welcome to Situation English —
the tool that helps you turn everyday Chinese into natural, conversational English
chunks.cn: 一个帮你把日常中文翻成自然口语英文的工具

chunks.en: you can actually use in real life.
chunks.cn: 你在真实生活里真正能用上的那种。

phrase_defs.everyday Chinese: 日常中文（口语场景高频词组）

styles.casual: Hey there, welcome to Situation English — the tool that helps you turn everyday Chinese into natural, conversational English you can actually use in real life.
styles.formal: Welcome to Situation English. This tool assists you in transforming routine Chinese expressions into natural, conversational English suitable for everyday communication.
styles.vlog: What is up everybody, welcome back — so this right here is Situation English, and honestly it is a game changer for turning your everyday Chinese into real-life English that just flows.
styles.swagger: Yo, check it — this is Situation English, and if you tryna level up your Chinese-to-English game, you already know what is happening. Real talk, it turns your daily Chinese into English you can spit on camera, you know what I'm saying.
styles.chill: Dude, so basically this thing — Situation English — it just takes your everyday Chinese and turns it into this super natural, chilled-out English vibe you can actually use anywhere. No stress, just good energy.

collocation_notes.note: 英语口语欢迎套话，地道且万能。
表示“把……变成……”的动词短语，口语高频。
真实生活的地道表达，口语常用。
